title: Ubiquiti UACC-LRE, Long-range Ethernet Repeater
description: The Long-range Indoor/Outdoor Repeater (UACC LRE) is Gigabit adapter that allows you to easily and inexpensively expand your Ethernet network's range. With its (2) GbE RJ45 ports, the UACC LRE can receive 802.3af/at PoE/PoE+ while providing passthrough PoE output. You can also chain multiple UACC LRE adapters together to connect access points and cameras that are far away from your PoE switch. The UACC LRE also offers 10kA+ surge protection and works reliably in extreme temperatures (-40 to… Establishes long-range connections between PoE switches and devices Chains with other UACC LRE units* (1) GbE RJ45 port for 802.3af/at PoE/PoE+ input (1) GbE RJ45 port for passthrough PoE output // 1,2 (+), 3,6 (-) 10kA+ surge protection Works reliably in extreme temperatures (-40 to 80° C) * 1 km link distances are only possible for devices with a max power consumption of 7W or less ** Deployment tested: (9) daisy-chained UACC LRE units connected to an endpoint device (e.g., camera, AP) using (10) 100m UISP Cable Pros, all powered a by UniFi PoE+ switch
